corpus.freeze_rule: Independent review records the SHA-256 of this exact manifest before provider implementation; any byte change requires a new revision and review.

input_contract.parser_input: UTF-8 bytes of each eml string exactly as decoded from JSON.

gold_contract.unsupported_rule: Every null value is named in unsupported_fields and every named unsupported field is null.
gold_contract.source_quote_rule: source_quote is synthetic evidence text that must survive in at least one bounded parsed fragment; output citations are validated against runtime fragment byte spans and quote hashes.
